description: Paul Bohm discusses how protocols can replace traditional companies, sharing his journey from Austria to founding Teleport, a ride-sharing app built on an open protocol that rewards early adopters. He reflects on the importance of community and the impact of open protocols on innovation.
topic_summary: In this talk, Paul Bohm explains the concept of protocols, their significance in technology, and how they can foster community and collaboration, drawing from his experiences in establishing a hackerspace and the evolution of crowdfunding through platforms like Kickstarter. [t=11:60]
